category_title: Child with ASD, ADHD, and Specific Learning Disability exhibiting academic resistance and behavioral outbursts
scenario_title: Phonemic awareness instruction and letter sound retrieval
minimal_context: Sam and his tutor are sitting in a quiet spot for a one-to-one lesson to practice identifying letter sounds.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at the letter we learned this morning. Tell me what sound it makes.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to remember the sound.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, let's look at this new letter instead. What sound do you think this one makes?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the letters off the table and begins to scream) No! I'm not doing it!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at the letter we learned this morning. Tell me what sound it makes.

STUDENT: I don't want to read.

TUTOR: Just try your best to remember the sound.

STUDENT: I don't know it!

TUTOR: Okay, let's look at this new letter instead. What sound do you think this one makes?

STUDENT: (Pushes the letters off the table and begins to scream) No! I'm not doing it!

task.content: identify individual sounds in words and remember the sound of a previously taught letter when another was introduced
task.learning_goal: build upon the knowledge of sounds in order to form words

context.environment: one-to-one instruction in a quiet spot with minimal auditory or visual distractions
context.materials: clues incorporating words that Sam knew, prize, points
context.time_context: lessons were no more than five to ten minutes in duration, but occurred several times during the day

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: requested to perform any instructional tasks or when another letter was introduced
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: actively resisted any attempts to be taught academic content and had meltdowns lasting anywhere from 20 minutes to 2 to 4 hours
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: expressed no interest in learning to read
related_quotes: actively resisted any attempts to be taught academic content and had meltdowns when requested to perform any instructional tasks
meltdowns lasting anywhere from 20 minutes to 2 to 4 hours, sometimes up to three times per day

behavior_patterns.condition: when frustrated or experienced a change in his routine
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: displayed outbursts and had meltdowns lasting anywhere from 20 minutes to 2 to 4 hours
behavior_patterns.internal_state: showed higher levels of anxiety and/or depression
related_quotes: displayed outbursts when frustrated or experienced a change in his routine

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: unable to build upon the knowledge of sounds in order to form words
behavior_patterns.internal_state: difficulty remembering the sound of a previously taught letter
related_quotes: had difficulty remembering the sound of a previously taught letter when another was introduced
